title: Access control for Guests user
excerpt:

1- Viewer [No update or amendments allowed]. 
2-Communicator [Only allowed to put updated]. 
3- User [Amend items without amending…

posts.author: Peter-Halloush (Peter)
posts.cookedHtml:
can we have control specifically for Guests users on the board in the following options:
1- Viewer [No update or amendments allowed].
2-Communicator [Only allowed to put updated].
3- User [Amend items without amending the file structure].
